Class GameSession

java.lang.Object
jogo.engine.GameSession
public class GameSession extends Object
Manages the core game state, including player turns, day progression, and invoking the event system to update game modifiers.
Author:
Fabio Cruz, Tiago Silva

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description

    Method
    Description
    String
    endTurn()
    Ends the current player's turn, switching active players and managing day progression.

    void
    loadGame(WorldMap map, Player player1, Player player2, int day)
    Loads an existing game session from a saved state, restoring the map with its structures, the players with their inventories, and the specific day.
    String
    startDayEvent()
    Triggers a random daily event, updates the session's current resource and score modifiers based on the event's outcome, and returns the event message.
    void
    startNewGame(String player1Name, String player2Name)
    Initializes a new game session from scratch, creating a fresh world map, resetting both players, and setting the calendar back to day 1.

    Methods inherited from class Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • GameSession

      public GameSession()

  • Method Details

    • startNewGame

      public void startNewGame(String player1Name, String player2Name)
      Initializes a new game session from scratch, creating a fresh world map, resetting both players, and setting the calendar back to day 1.
      Parameters:
      player1Name - The name of the player who takes the first turn.
      player2Name - The name of the player who follows.

    • loadGame

      public void loadGame(WorldMap map, Player player1, Player player2, int day)
      Loads an existing game session from a saved state, restoring the map with its structures, the players with their inventories, and the specific day.
      Parameters:
      map - The saved WorldMap state to be restored.
      player1 - The saved data for player 1.
      player2 - The saved data for player 2.
      day - The current day retrieved from the save file.

    • startDayEvent

      public String startDayEvent()
      Triggers a random daily event, updates the session's current resource and score modifiers based on the event's outcome, and returns the event message.
      Returns:
      A String describing the event and its effects for the current day.

    • endTurn

      public String endTurn()
      Ends the current player's turn, switching active players and managing day progression.
      Returns:
      A String containing the current or new event message.

    • getActualPlayerEndDayCosts

      public Map<ResourceType, Integer> getActualPlayerEndDayCosts()
      Returns the resources that will be consumed at the end of the day for the current active player.
      Returns:
      A map containing the resource costs for the current player.

    • getWinner

      public Player getWinner()
      Determines the winner of the game session once the match has concluded. Compares the final scores of both players to declare the victor.
      Returns:
      The Player object with the highest score; null if the game is still in progress or if the match ends in a tie.

    • isGameOver

      public boolean isGameOver()

      public WorldMap getMap()

      public Player getPlayer1()
